channel.title: mysql - 标签 - LHCの博客
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Mysql备份
item.description: [MySql数据库备份的几种方式]mysqldump工具备份备份整个数据库 1 2 $> mysqldump -u root -h host -p dbname > backdb.sql 备份数据库中的某个表 1 2 $> mysqldump -u root -h host -p dbname tbname1,

item.title: MySql:master:slave:slave
item.description: Hosts CPU MEM HD OS 192.168.1.102 db01 8 16G 100G Ubuntu20.04 192.168.1.105 db02 8 16G 100G Ubuntu20.04 192.168.1.108 db03 8 16G 100G Ubuntu20.04 安装前修改两台服务器的hosts 1 2 3 4 5 # 三臺台服务器都要操作 sudo vim /etc/hosts 192.168.1.102 db01 192.168.1.105 db02 192.168.1.108 db03 創建MySQ
